hero.title: WATERWORKS & MUNICIPAL
hero.subtitle: High-precision ductile iron pipe fittings, mechanical joint restraints, valves, valve boxes, and municipal castings. Designed to AWWA & ASTM standards with strategic distribution centers in Waco & Houston, Texas.

products.name: H2 Wedge-Action Mechanical Joint Restraint (Series 4000)
products.description: Wedge-action restraint glands engineered for plastic pressure pipes, PVC pipe, and ductile iron installations. Features auto-torque twist-off actuating screws for error-free installation.
features: Heat-treated ductile iron gripping wedges for maximum hold
Torque-limiting twist-off nuts guarantee exact torque without special tools
Dual compatibility on both Ductile Iron and AWWA C900 PVC pipe
350 PSI rating with full thrust restraint efficiency

specs.Compatibility: Ductile Iron Pipe & AWWA C900 PVC

products.name: H2 Mechanical Joint Wedge Restraint for Ductile Iron Pipe (Series 3000)
products.description: Heavy-duty mechanical joint wedge restraint gland engineered specifically for ductile iron pipe mains. Features individually moving wedges that increase grip force as line pressure increases.
features: High-strength ductile iron Grade 65-45-12 body construction
Precision machined heat-treated wedges bite into ductile pipe wall
Twist-off actuating bolt heads ensure positive visual installation check
350 PSI water working pressure rating with 2:1 safety factor

products.name: H2 Restraint Harness Assembly for C900 PVC Pipe (Series 1100)
products.description: Split serrated restraint ring and tie-rod assembly designed to restrain push-on PVC pipe bell joints and mechanical joint fittings against thrust loads.
features: Full 360-degree contact non-crushing serrated clamping band
High-strength low-alloy Corten tie rods and hex nuts included
Prevents joint pull-out on municipal PVC water distribution lines
Easily retrofitted onto existing C900 PVC pipe installations

specs.Material: Ductile Iron ASTM A536 & Corten Rods

products.name: H2 AWWA C153 Compact Ductile Iron Pipe Fittings
products.description: Full line of Mechanical Joint (MJ) and Flanged ductile iron fittings including bends, tees, crosses, reducers, and sleeves manufactured to AWWA C153 compact standards.
features: AWWA C153 compact lightweight ductile iron specification
NSF/ANSI 61 & NSF 372 certified lead-free for potable water
Cement mortar lined (AWWA C104) or fusion bonded epoxy coated
350 PSI working pressure rating for high-pressure water mains

products.name: H2 AWWA C110 Full-Body Ductile Iron Flanged Fittings
products.description: Heavy-duty AWWA C110 full-body flanged ductile iron fittings designed for water treatment plants, pump stations, and exposed vault piping systems.
features: Heavy-wall AWWA C110 full-body pattern for severe duty
Class 125 & Class 250 flange bolt pattern specifications
Double-coated asphaltic or NSF 61 epoxy interior lining
250 PSI / 300 PSI working pressure capability

specs.Application: Water Plants, Pump Stations & Meter Vaults

products.name: H2 AWWA Resilient Wedge Gate Valve (NRS)
products.description: AWWA C515 / C509 resilient wedge gate valves with fusion-bonded epoxy coating inside and out. Delivers bubble-tight shutoff and low operating torque for municipal water mains.
features: AWWA C515 reduced-wall ductile iron resilient wedge design
EPDM fully encapsulated ductile iron wedge
250 PSI & 300 PSI working pressure rating
NSF/ANSI 61 and NSF/ANSI 372 lead-free certified

specs.Ends: MJ x MJ, Flange x MJ, Flange x Flange

products.name: H2 AWWA OS&Y Flanged Resilient Wedge Gate Valve
products.description: Outside Screw and Yoke (OS&Y) rising stem resilient wedge gate valves engineered for fire protection mains, industrial facilities, and indoor vault installations.
features: UL Listed and FM Approved for fire service applications
Rising bronze stem provides clear visual position indication
Handwheel operated with low torque bubble-tight seating
Fusion-bonded epoxy coated to AWWA C550 specifications

specs.Material: Ductile Iron Body with Stainless/Bronze Stem
specs.Approvals: UL Listed / FM Approved / AWWA C515

products.name: H2 MJ Gasket Packs & Corten T-Head Bolt Sets
products.description: High-strength Corten low-alloy steel T-head bolts and heavy-duty SBR/EPDM gaskets for Mechanical Joint pipe, valve, and fitting installations.
features: High-strength corrosion-resistant Corten steel (ASTM A242)
Standard SBR & transition gaskets for Ductile Iron and PVC
Includes heavy hex nuts meeting ANSI/AWWA C111/A21.11
Color-coded job site packaging for instant identification

products.name: H2 Integrated Restrained Adapter Coupling System
products.description: Innovative integrated mechanical joint adapter allowing rapid, rigid connection of valves and fittings without external thrust blocks or long pipe spools.
features: Integrates mechanical joint restraint into compact fitting
Eliminates pipe movement & joint separation under pressure
Short lay-length ideal for tight vault & valve box installations
350 PSI pressure rated with full 2:1 safety factor

products.name: H2 Heavy Duty Screw-Type & Slip-Type Valve Boxes (5 1/4")
products.description: Cast iron two-piece and three-piece valve boxes designed to provide secure access to underground gate valves. Available in screw-type and slip-type configurations with WATER or SEWER marked drop-in or locking lids.
features: ASTM A48 Class 35B Grey Iron construction
AASHTO H-20 heavy highway traffic load rated
Screw-type and slip-type telescoping height adjustment
TxDOT & regional municipal waterworks approved

products.name: H2 Heavy Duty Traffic Manhole Ring & Cover (24" - 36" Opening)
products.description: Machined bearing seat manhole frames and covers for municipal storm, sewer, and water systems. Delivers non-rocking, heavy traffic support for roads and municipal infrastructure.
features: Ductile Iron ASTM A536 & Grey Iron Class 35B
Precision machined bearing seats prevent rattling under traffic
Custom municipal logo & lettering options (City of Houston, Dallas, Austin)
Available in watertight gasketed and bolt-down configurations

specs.Material: ASTM A536 Ductile / ASTM A48 Class 35B

products.name: H2 Municipal Sewer Cleanout & Access Box
products.description: Heavy-duty cast iron cleanout housings engineered for residential and municipal lateral line access. Designed to withstand surface traffic while protecting cleanout plugs.
features: Heavy-duty rim and protective cast iron lid
Compatible with countersunk brass cleanout plugs
Corrosion-resistant asphaltic dip coating
Engineered for sub-grade lateral protection

products.name: H2 Cast Iron & Polymer Hybrid Meter Box Assemblies
products.description: Protective underground enclosures for residential and commercial water meters. Available with heavy cast iron lids featuring touch-read AMR/AMI sensor ports and high-density polymer bodies.
features: Integrated AMR/AMI electronic meter reading probe port
High-strength UV-stabilised polymer body with cast iron lid
Pedestrian and light vehicular traffic load capacity
Locking lid mechanism to prevent unauthorized tampering

specs.Material: HDPE Body with ASTM A48 Cast Iron Lid

products.name: H2 Storm Drainage Catch Basin Frames & Grates
products.description: High-capacity storm inlet frames, curb inlet assemblies, and trench grates designed for maximum hydraulic flow and bicycle safety compliance on municipal roadways.
features: ADA compliant & bicycle-safe slot patterns
AASHTO H-20 / HS-20 heavy highway traffic load certified
Vandal-resistant bolt-down security options
Curb inlet & drop inlet frame configurations

specs.Material: ASTM A536 Ductile Iron / Class 35B Grey Iron

products.name: H2 Municipal Specialty Castings & Extension Rings
products.description: Grade adjustment rings, valve box extensions, riser rings, and specialty municipal castings designed for road resurfacing and utility grade adjustments without excavation.
features: Rapid road grade elevation without costly pavement excavation
Fits standard valve boxes & manhole frames seamlessly
Heavy-duty cast iron durability under traffic loads
Approved under TxDOT and regional road authority specs

products.name: H2 Certified Municipal Infrastructure Overstock Deals
products.description: High-volume surplus and overstock municipal castings and fittings available directly from our Texas warehouses at discounted distributor pricing.
features: 100% factory certified brand new inventory
Immediate dispatch from Waco & Houston distribution hubs
Deep volume pricing discounts for contractors & municipalities
Limited availability lot sizes across popular waterworks items

specs.Certification: Full ASTM & AWWA Submittal Docs Provided

regional.desc: City of Houston Approved Castings & Fittings
City of Fort Worth Water Department Submittals
